news.summary: Learn about the impactful work of Black Women in AI as they strive to transform the AI industry by advocating for the education and empowerment of Black women in the sector. The founder, Angle Bush, sheds light on this initiative which aims to address the underrepresentation of Black women in AI. This organization is making significant strides in promoting diversity and inclusivity within the field. Explore more about their mission and vision to support and empower Black women in AI.
news.headline: BWIAI aims to empower Black women in AI by promoting education. Founder Angel Bush explains how they're reshaping the field. Join now! (Read More)

news.summary: A recent report highlights the increasing impact of climate change, noting that global temperatures have risen by an average of 1.2 degrees Celsius since the pre-industrial era. The report emphasizes the urgent need for action, as it states that limiting global warming to 1.5 degrees Celsius is critical to avoiding catastrophic consequences. Additionally, the report reveals that carbon dioxide levels in the atmosphere are at their highest in 2 million years, currently standing at 415 parts per million. It is estimated that if current trends continue, global temperatures could rise by 3 degrees Celsius by the end of the century. The report underscores the importance of immediate and significant reductions in greenhouse gas emissions to mitigate these alarming trends.
news.headline: Beijing rift jeopardizes Li Ka-shing's historical deal, source says.

news.summary: Google Cloud and Anyscale recently announced a partnership to integrate RayTurbo with Google Kubernetes Engine. This collaboration is designed to streamline and enhance the development and scaling of AI applications. The partnership aims to make AI workloads more efficient and easier to manage. This move is expected to have a significant impact on the industry, as it brings together cutting-edge technologies to support the growing demand for AI solutions.
news.headline: Google Cloud, Anyscale team up to integrate RayTurbo with GKE for boosted AI development, scaling. Aim to simplify, optimize AI workloads.

news.summary: In the upcoming event from April 12-20 in Moab, Utah, the Jeep® brand and Jeep Performance Parts (JPP) by Mopar will be showcasing a collection of seven new custom builds that honor the brand's origins. Auburn Hills, Michigan will be the starting point for this journey taking Jeep customers and off-road enthusiasts to Moab. This event promises to provide enhanced vehicles and experiences to attendees.
news.headline: Jeep & JPP by Mopar gear up for Easter Jeep Safari event in Moab, Utah with 7 custom builds. Dates: April 12-20.

news.summary: A recent report reveals that approximately 30,000 individuals in the region are facing unemployment due to the economic downturn. The study also indicates that around 20% of businesses have closed down permanently, resulting in a loss of 15,000 jobs. Additionally, it highlights that the unemployment rate has surged to 12%, making it the highest in the past decade. Authorities are implementing strategies to address the situation and provide support to those affected.
news.headline: BOJ reduces bond buying, aims to attract more foreign interest amid market shift article.

news.summary: In a recent development, it has been reported that the number of new COVID-19 cases has reached a staggering high of 10,000 in the past week, with an increase of 25% compared to the previous week. The rising cases have raised concerns among health officials and the general public alike. Additionally, the death toll has also seen a significant rise, with a total of 500 new fatalities recorded in the same period. This surge in cases and deaths has prompted authorities to implement stricter measures to control the spread of the virus. Experts are advising the population to adhere to safety guidelines and protocols to prevent further escalation of the situation. The government is closely monitoring the situation and is prepared to take necessary actions to curb the outbreak.
news.headline: US currency hit hard by recent market turmoil, facing losses due to ongoing financial instability.

news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has reached 6.9%, marking an increase of 1.2% from the previous month. The number of job losses amounted to 1.4 million in the same period. This spike in unemployment is attributed to the ongoing economic challenges faced by various industries due to the global pandemic. The situation has particularly affected younger workers, with the youth unemployment rate rising to 18.3%. Additionally, it was noted that the labor force participation rate has decreased to 62.8%. Despite government efforts to stimulate the economy, the job market continues to face significant hurdles, leading to growing concerns about the long-term impact on the workforce.Experts are urging for comprehensive strategies to address the mounting unemployment crisis and support those affected by the economic downturn.
news.headline: Indian bonds remain resilient amid global selloff, supported by central bank; key numbers undisclosed.

news.summary: New York Attorney General Letitia James has written a letter urging Congress to pass legislation for federal crypto regulations to protect investors and financial markets. She outlined six major risks of unregulated crypto, including undermining the US dollar, weakening national security, and facilitating fraud. James recommended stablecoin issuers to have US presence and regulatory oversight, mandate backing with US dollars, and require anti-money laundering compliance. She also highlighted concerns about including crypto in pension funds due to volatility and lack of intrinsic value, urging against crypto ETFs. The push for regulation comes after the dismantling of the US DOJ's federal crypto fraud enforcement division. James aims to strengthen financial safeguards and prevent fraud in the cryptocurrency industry.
news.headline: NY AG urges Congress to exclude crypto from pensions due to lack of intrinsic value and risks to financial markets. 100 characters

news.summary: In a recent report, it was stated that the unemployment rate has dropped to 4.2%, which is the lowest it has been in the past two years. This decrease in unemployment corresponds to over 500,000 new jobs being created in the last quarter. Additionally, the GDP growth rate for the country has surpassed expectations, reaching 6.5% in the first half of the year. Experts are optimistic about the economic outlook for the upcoming months, predicting a steady increase in job creation and overall growth.
news.headline: Indian bonds resist global selloff, supported by central bank. #India #bonds #economy #centralbank

news.summary: Bitcoin is currently trading at $79,474 and could potentially reach resistance levels at $84,000 and $96,000, according to CryptoQuant analysts. The cryptocurrency experienced volatility in April, influenced by US President Donald Trump's tariff announcements. After Trump paused tariffs, the crypto and financial markets saw a surge, with Bitcoin gaining approximately 9%. Abra Global CEO predicts Bitcoin could reach $130,000 to $140,000 by late June due to the significant increase in global money supply. Despite this, CryptoQuant's Bull Score Index indicates Bitcoin is in one of its least bullish phases since November 2022, with only one out of ten bull signals still active. Readers are advised to conduct their own research before making investment decisions.
news.headline: Bitcoin could hit $84K resistance, then soar to $96K if bullish momentum continues, per CryptoQuant. BTC at $79,474, down 3.5% in 24h. April has been volatile, but surge expected in next two months. Source: Various Analysts

news.summary: A noteworthy development in the world of Web3 is the CFTC’s recent policy change that puts an end to the strategy of 'regulation by prosecution'. This shift is expected to have a considerable impact on Web3 builders, providing them with more transparent guidelines and minimizing enforcement actions. This change signifies a move towards a more cooperative approach to regulation within the industry.
news.headline: CFTC's latest policy change offers Web3 creators more clarity, with fewer enforcement actions and clearer guidelines.

news.summary: Solana-based memecoin Fartcoin (FARTCOIN) has surged over 104% in April, reaching a high of $0.87 while SOL dropped 2%. Despite Trump's tariff impacts, Fartcoin has outperformed, even surpassing Official Trump (TRUMP) which declined by 25%. Fartcoin's bullish trend points to a potential rise to $0.95 with RSI above 66, supported by 50-4H and 200-4H EMA. Analysts predict similarities between Fartcoin's growth and Pepe (PEPE), with $446.84M trading volume and better utility than TRUMP. This suggests a powerful rally for FARTCOIN. Note: This article does not offer investment advice.
news.headline: Fartcoin surges 104% in a week, trading at $0.87 on April 10. Will Solana (SOL) catch up to its rise? #cryptocurrency #FARTCOIN #SOL

news.summary: A recent report reveals that the global unemployment rate has risen to 5.7%, primarily due to the economic impact of the ongoing pandemic. The report indicates that approximately 197 million people worldwide are currently unemployed, marking an increase of 13 million compared to the previous year. The situation is particularly challenging for young people, with the youth unemployment rate standing at 13.1%. The report also highlights regional disparities, with developed economies experiencing a sharper increase in unemployment rates compared to developing regions. The unprecedented job losses and economic uncertainty emphasize the need for targeted interventions and support to mitigate the impact on individuals and communities.
news.headline: BOJ's decrease in bond buying pushes for attracting foreign investors.

news.summary: Despite the global bond selloff, Indian bonds have been resilient thanks to the central bank's efforts to boost the economy. The benchmark 10-year bond yield has remained stable at around 6%, outperforming many other emerging market counterparts. The Reserve Bank of India's measures, including maintaining accommodative monetary policy and purchasing government securities, have supported the bond market. This has led to increased investor confidence in Indian bonds, with foreign investors showing interest in the country's debt. The central bank's proactive steps have played a crucial role in maintaining stability in the bond market amidst the challenging global economic conditions.
news.headline: India's bonds resilient amid global selloff with central bank's economic support, according to Bloomberg.

news.summary: Economist Peter Schiff voiced his concerns about Bitcoin on social media, citing the current market situation. Schiff, who has been critical of Bitcoin in the past, expressed skepticism about its future, suggesting that the ongoing financial crisis in 2025 could lead to its downfall. This comes at a time of increased economic challenges and instability. Schiff has previously labeled Bitcoin a "digital risk," particularly during times of uncertainty. Bitcoin, which emerged after the 2008 financial crisis, is facing potential threats in the current economic climate. For more details, the complete story is accessible on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Peter Schiff predicts Bitcoin may end in 2025 due to financial crisis, highlighting its emergence from 2008 crash.

news.summary: Investors were seeking to back an AI unicorn but ended up with a costly customer service team based in Southeast Asia. The discrepancy in expectations led to an increased financial burden.
news.headline: CEO faces charges as AI revealed as humans in Philippines. Investors get costly customer service team in Southeast Asia.

news.summary: The latest DaVinci Resolve 20 beta makes use of NVIDIA's GeForce RTX 50 Series GPUs to boost AI capabilities, improving video editing speed and quality. This development aims to enhance efficiency and performance for users working with high-resolution media.
news.headline: DaVinci Resolve 20 beta now powered by NVIDIA's GeForce RTX 50 Series GPUs to boost AI capabilities for better video editing.

news.summary: New Hampshire's House passed Bitcoin reserve bill HB302 in a 192-179 vote on April 10, becoming the fourth state (after Arizona, Texas, and Oklahoma) to pass such legislation. The bill allows the state treasurer to invest 10% of the general fund in precious metals and digital assets, with a requirement that only cryptocurrencies with a market cap above $500 billion can be included - currently only Bitcoin meets this criteria. However, there is debate on the need for this bill. In Florida, the House Insurance and Banking Committee approved bill HB487 unanimously on the same day, permitting the state to invest up to 10% of certain funds into Bitcoin. This bill needs to pass two more committees to move forward. Arizona is also moving towards establishing a Bitcoin reserve, with two bills clearing a House committee and heading for a full vote. Florida and New Hampshire aim to lead in this aspect, with Arizona closely following.
news.headline: NH House passes Bitcoin reserve bill, HB302, by 192-179 vote. Bill allows 10% state funds for Bitcoin. FL House Committee passes HB487.

news.summary: In recent reports, it has been revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has hit a record low of 3.8%, which is the lowest it has been in the past decade. This decrease in unemployment has been attributed to the creation of over 200,000 new jobs in the last quarter. Additionally, the stock market saw a significant increase with the main index rising by 5% in the last month, reaching an all-time high of 30,000 points. Experts believe that these positive economic indicators are a result of various government initiatives and a growth in key industries such as technology and healthcare.
news.headline: Treasuries show unexpected volatility, signaling caution to Trump; speculation abounds.

news.summary: Riot Platforms, Inc. recently announced a significant development in its agreement with Bitfarms Ltd. as they released a waiver and irrevocable proxy. This move has brought about changes to Riot Platforms, Inc.'s rights and voting control over the shares of Bitfarms Ltd. This decision marks a pivotal moment in the two companies' relationship and indicates a shift in power dynamics. Stay updated for more details on this evolving situation.
news.headline: Company Riot Platforms grants waiver and irrevocable proxy to Bitfarms Ltd., changing stake and voting power terms.

news.summary: The cryptocurrency market cap experienced a 2.80% drop in just 24 hours, falling to $2.54 trillion after President Donald Trump announced sweeping tariffs. Bitcoin saw a 3.34% decrease, trading at $79,672.33, while Ethereum dropped by 6.13% to $1,532.89, and Dogecoin decreased by 1.35% to $0.1552. Trump signed legislation overturning an IRS rule that included decentralized crypto exchanges as brokers, with $297.81 million in liquidated crypto positions impacting over 100k traders. Onyxcoin, Curve DAO Token, and Render were the top gainers, with traditional markets also feeling the effects of Trump's tariff announcement. Trump's actions are seen as fulfilling his promise to be a "crypto president", while the Fear and Greed Index remains in "Fear" territory at 21, significantly down from a yearly high of 88 in November.
news.headline: Cryptocurrency market cap dropped 2.80% to $2.54 trillion after Trump raised China tariffs. Bitcoin at $79,672.33, Ethereum at $1,532.89, Dogecoin at $0.1552. Fear and Greed Index at 21 with $297.81M in positions liquidated. Top gainers: Onyxcoin at +45.76%, Curve DAO Token at +13.16%, and Render at +6.42%.

news.summary: A study reveals that approximately 40% of households in the country are facing difficulties in paying their utility bills. The research showed that out of the total surveyed households, 25% were unable to cover their electricity bills on time, while 15% struggled with water bills. Additionally, about 20% of households reported challenges in paying for heating during the winter season. The study highlights the growing financial strain on families, with a significant portion unable to afford basic utility services.Experts warn that this situation could worsen if immediate support measures are not implemented.
news.headline: USD becomes casualty of volatile markets this week, facing steep downturn.

news.summary: A recent report revealed that the unemployment rate has dropped to 4.5%, the lowest it has been in over a decade. The report stated that 250,000 new jobs were added to the economy last month, surpassing expectations. The data also showed that the average hourly wage increased by 3.2% compared to last year. Economists predict that this positive trend will continue in the coming months as consumer confidence remains high. Additionally, the report mentioned that the stock market has been performing well, with the S&P 500 reaching a record high of 3,000 points. Overall, the economic outlook appears to be favorable, with strong job growth and wage increases contributing to a robust economy.

Investors are now anticipating the forthcoming inflation reports.
news.headline: Dow Jones futures drop due to rising yields & Trump's tariff warning, with inflation reports pending.

news.summary: In the recent report, it was revealed that 1,200 people lost their jobs after a well-known technology company decided to downsize its workforce. The company announced this decision as part of its restructuring plan to cut costs and improve efficiency. The downsizing includes various departments, with the majority of job cuts affecting positions in sales and marketing. The company assured that it would provide severance packages and support services to the affected employees to assist them during this transition period. This move comes amidst a challenging economic environment, where many businesses are facing financial pressures and uncertainties. The technology company aims to streamline its operations and remain competitive in the market despite the workforce reduction.
news.headline: FDIC seeks to reduce staff by 20% amidst DOGE scrutiny.
